subcodes.first_line: O kind Lord! In the village of Kushkak, a group of the friends and handmaidens of the Merciful have cast off their earthly garments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یزدان مهربان در قریه کوشکک جمعی از احباء و اماء الرحمن خلع ثیاب عنصری نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed
